pages.text:
Welcome to The Journey.

There's no one to help you with a bunch of quests here, so you'll need to define your goals yourself. The easiest way to choose where to go is to search for #unlocks in JEI for the tier you are in. For example, the tier 1 unlock is Aurorian Portal.
Research JEI to see how to get there!
As you go further through the pack, there will be less handholding, though some useful notes will still be in this book.
